layout.container: w-full max-w-md mx-auto h-[100dvh] bg-[#F8F7F4] relative overflow-hidden flex flex-col shadow-2xl
layout.bottomNav: absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 h-16 bg-white/95 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-[#E4E2DC] flex justify-around items-center z-50

components.matchCard: relative w-full aspect-[3/4] rounded-3xl overflow-hidden shadow-md bg-white border border-[#E4E2DC]
components.fosterCard: flex flex-col bg-white rounded-2xl p-4 shadow-sm border border-[#E4E2DC]
components.bottomTab: flex flex-col items-center justify-center w-16 h-full text-[#57645C] data-[active=true]:text-[#2C402B]
components.primaryButton: w-full bg-[#9BAE96] text-white py-4 rounded-xl font-medium text-lg flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-[#8A9F85] transition-colors
components.secondaryButton: w-full bg-[#F8F7F4] text-[#2C402B] py-4 rounded-xl font-medium text-lg flex items-center justify-center border border-[#E4E2DC]
components.clayButton: w-full bg-[#C07E67] text-white py-4 rounded-xl font-medium text-lg flex items-center justify-center
components.input: w-full bg-white border border-[#E4E2DC] rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-[#1F2924] placeholder:text-[#57645C]/50 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#9BAE96]

instructions_to_main_agent: Do NOT change the HTML document title or app icon. Keep the app icon exactly as is.

Build a mobile-responsive web prototype for PetPal mimicking a native mobile app. Implement inside a max-w-md centered container with h-[100dvh], hidden scrollbars for content area, and a fixed bottom navigation bar.
Implement EXACTLY 4 bottom tabs: 1) Matches (Potriviri) 2) Foster 3) Messages (Mesaje) 4) Profile (Profil).
For the Matches tab, use Framer Motion for Tinder-like swipeable match cards with large animal photos. Include action buttons below the card for alternative matching.
The Matches tab needs an Animal Selector Dropdown (e.g., Dog/Cat) and a Match Mode Selector (Play/Social/Verified Mate).
Implement a Filter Sheet (sliding up from bottom) for filtering matches.
Include a match success animation overlay when a user matches, and a 'Verified Mate Locked State'.

For the Foster tab, display Foster Case Cards (list view, NO swipe gestures). Include a Multi-Step Form for foster application, a Foster Manage Dashboard (role-gated simulation), and a Rescuer Demo Preview banner.
The Messages tab must show a context-aware inbox. Differentiate messages coming from Matches vs Foster. Implement a Conversation Thread with a Context Header and a Safety Menu (Report/Block).
The Profile tab acts as a user control room. Include a Verification Checklist, My Animals section, Preferences Split (Match vs Foster), and a Language Toggle (EN/RO).

Design with the organic color palette: warm cream backgrounds, deep green for trust, sage for primary actions, clay for foster urgency, soft sky for info, rose for warnings ONLY. No neons, no dating-app pinks.
Ensure all interactive elements and sections include role-based data-testid attributes for testing.
Implement empty states, locked states, and success states across the application where relevant.
Use mock data throughout the prototype. Do not build a backend.
